title: The State of Italian Business in Malaysia
summary: A continuously updated record of Italian companies and institutions in Malaysia, by sector and city, set against the macro indicators that move the market. Compiled from primary registries and reconciled company by company.

companySources.name: Italian Chamber of Commerce in Malaysia

methodology: Company counts are compiled from the Italian Chamber of Commerce roster, ICE records and SSM registrations, de-duplicated by company. Macro indicators are drawn from the latest official releases and refreshed on a schedule. Figures are labelled with their source and period. Corrections welcome.
dataStatus: PLACEHOLDER — sample company and macro data for layout only. Replace src/data/companies.json and macro.json with verified figures before promoting to any institution.
